hero.subtitle: Frontend Engineer specializing in React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies

about.p1: As a frontend engineer with a background in electronics and music production, I bring a unique perspective to web development. I specialize in building performant, accessible, and beautiful web applications.
about.p2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me producing music or exploring the intersection of technology and creativity. I believe the best digital experiences come from understanding both the technical and human sides of a problem.

nym.title: AI Real-Estate Search & Roommate Finder (NYC)
nym.description: Conversational React app where NYC renters can search apartments, match roommates, and chat with an AI agent in real time.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Dashboard

sam17.description: Hardware synthesizer with custom DSP and MIDI implementation

abc.description: Minimal, high-performance website for art director Angélica Burgos, built with React and Vite, featuring optimized images and smooth animations.

I’m always open to exploring new opportunities and collaborating on high-level projects.
